name: PharmX Technologies Limited
description: PharmX Technologies Limited is Australia’s leading pharmacy ordering network, providing a reliable, integrated platform that connects pharmacies with suppliers, wholesalers, and technology vendors. Used by 99% of Australian pharmacies, the company facilitates seamless ordering through its Gateway and Marketplace solutions, supported by advanced analytics. By automating EDI processes and streamlining supply chain operations, PharmX helps pharmacies reduce administrative tasks and errors while enabling suppliers to increase brand visibility and drive sales. The company is committed to fostering an efficient, data-driven ecosystem that supports the growth and success of the entire pharmacy industry.
